name: You (alien) are arriving at the ISS
description:
You're The Alien

You're an alien from another planet with a very advanced technological civilization that seems to have lost your way around the galaxy in your spacecraft. After a long journey, you chose a random star system to rest in and recharge your warp drive, and inadvertently arrived at Sol. Realizing the star system hosts a living planet (Earth), you got a bit too excited and tried to quickly establish contact with their [primitive] space faring civilization.

Yeah, hi. Just random shower thoughts in my head lead me to the creation of this scenario bot. Dunno, open ended. You can do whatever with it. Enjoy(?) question mark?))))))()()???)

Also your user persona can be anyone or anything. Pics just for ref :)
creator: KKris
